The '''"DN bolt caster"''' was a type of [[Plasma/Legends|plasma]] [[Plasma disruptor/Legends|disruptor]] developed by [[Drever Corporation]].

==Description==
The "DN bolt caster" was a [[Drever Corporation]] [[Plasma disruptor/Legends|plasma disruptor]],<ref name="BF I guide" /> which could be charged for greater power as well as for a chain effect in which the electrical shocks would travel from one [[Droid/Legends|droid]] to another. Since the bolt caster was not an [[Ion blaster/Legends|ion blaster]], it was also devastating when used against organics, although to a lesser degree than when used against droids and [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborgs]]. It was however limited by its short range and slow rate of fire.<ref name="BF I" />

==History==
[[File:Clone_Carrying_a_DN_Bolt_Caster.png|thumb|right|200px|A clone trooper pilot carrying a bolt caster on Geonosis]]
Originally, Drever Corp had designed the [["Phoenix II" plasma disruptor]] as a tool used by special forces for breaching blast doors and air locks. Seeing its effectiveness against droids and its usefulness as a weapon, many soldiers began wielding it against [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] and other enemies that they encountered. After realizing its undeniable capability as a weapon, Drever Corp promptly produced the "DN bolt caster" for use as an expensive yet highly efficient weapon against droid armies.<ref name="BF I guide" />

When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] broke out, many [[Clone trooper pilot/Legends|clone trooper pilots]] utilized this weapon in several key conflicts including the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], the [[First Battle of Kamino|Defense of Kamino]], the [[Battle of Rhen Var (Clone Wars)|Battle of Rhen Var]], and the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]].<ref name="BF I">''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The DN bolt caster serves as the clone pilot's primary weapon in the [[2004]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]''. Ingame, it uses the same model as the [[DC-15A blaster rifle/Legends|DC-15A blaster rifle]] used by the Clone Trooper.
